creator: lq@et-toile.com
text:
Hello,

  I was searching for this version as I use HPB with Nextcloud 31, so thank you very much for working on it.

Trying to compile I received this error :

=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/google-go-genproto-796eee8c2d53_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: 5879150: No such file or directory
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this

How to solve it please?

Thank you very much and best regards
